allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Command 'winget' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(\\$?\) { Write-Host 'winget available' } else { Write-Host 'winget not available' }")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri '\\''http://localhost:8080'\\'' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host '\\''Status: '\\'' $r.StatusCode; Write-Host '\\''Content length: '\\'' $r.Content.Length } catch { Write-Host '\\''Failed: '\\'' $_.Exception.Message }')
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Process -FilePath 'netsh' -ArgumentList 'http add urlacl url=http://+:8080/ user=ALL APPLICATION PACKAGES' -Verb RunAs -Wait")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Start-Job -FilePath '\\''e:/my_1st_claudeCode_prjt/scripts/start-server.ps1'\\'' | Out-Null; Start-Sleep 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri '\\''http://127.0.0.1:8080'\\'' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host '\\''✅ HTTP '\\'' $r.StatusCode '\\'' - '\\'' $r.Content.Length '\\'' bytes'\\''; if \($r.Content.Length -gt 100\) { Write-Host '\\''✅ Web UI loaded OK'\\'' } } catch { Write-Host '\\''❌ '\\'' $_.Exception.Message }')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Start-Sleep 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri '\\''http://100.118.175.65:8080'\\'' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host '\\''✅ Server accessible on Tailscale IP'\\''; Write-Host '\\''Content: '\\'' $r.Content.Length '\\''bytes'\\'' } catch { Write-Host '\\''⚠ Server not ready yet: '\\'' $_.Exception.Message }')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Start-Sleep 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri '\\''http://100.118.175.65:8080'\\'' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host '\\''✅ Server OK - '\\'' $r.StatusCode '\\'' '\\'' $r.Content.Length '\\''bytes'\\'' } catch { Write-Host '\\''⚠ '\\'' $_.Exception.Message }')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri '\\''http://127.0.0.1:8080'\\'' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host '\\''✅ Server running: '\\'' $r.StatusCode } catch { Write-Host '\\''Failed: '\\'' $_.Exception.Message }')
